title: The Proliferation of DarkSword: iOS Exploit Chain Adopted by Multiple Threat Act

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — The Proliferation of DarkSword: iOS Exploit Chain Adopted by
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/21
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*6cde159c.js*'
            - '*a9bc5c66.js*'
            - '*document.body*'
            - '*document.write*'
            - '*e5.malaymoil*'
            - '*file.includes*'
            - '*frame.src*'
            - '*frame.style.border*'
            - '*frame.style.height*'
            - '*frame.style.left*'
            - '*frame.style.opacity*'
            - '*frame.style.position*'
            - '*frame.style.width*'
            - '*iframe.src*'
            - '*iframe.style.border*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_The_Proliferation_of_DarkSword__iOS_Expl {
    meta:
        description = "The Proliferation of DarkSword: iOS Exploit Chain Adopted by"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "2e5a56beb63f21d9347310412ae6efb29fd3db2d3a3fc0798865a29a3c578d35" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
